title: relhania calycina
intro: Relhania calycina, also known as the Red Hottentot Tea bush, is a shrub native to the Eastern Cape province of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Relhania calycina include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. Relhania calycina can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
